body_excerpt: In DeregAcceptProcINT of cn_NrmmStateDeregInit.cpp, there is a possible denial of service due to a logic error in the code. This could lead to remote denial of service with no additional execution privileges needed. User interaction is not needed for exploitation.

reasons: 資産不一致または判定情報不足
